St. Bernard Parish Sheriff's Office arrests man after narcotics investigation
The St. Bernard Parish Sheriff's Office has arrested a man after multiple narcotics were found in his possession. Kerry Major, 37, of Violet, was arrested after he was found in possession of crack cocaine, fentanyl, heroin, marijuana, Xanax, and drug paraphernalia. During the investigation, deputies also found a 9mm handgun with an obliterated serial number. Major is also being booked for illegal window tint and a suspended driver's license. He is being held on a $274,850 bond.
VIOLET, La. —
The St. Bernard Parish Sheriff's Office has arrested a man after multiple narcotics were found in his possession.
Kerry Major, 37, of Violet, was arrested after he was found in possession of crack cocaine, fentanyl, heroin, marijuana, Xanax, and drug paraphernalia.
Advertisement
During the investigation, deputies also found a 9mm handgun with an obliterated serial number.
Major is also being booked for illegal window tint and a suspended driver's license.
He is being held on a $274,850 bond.
